extra.reason: NodeStateSummary published per tailer, SSE state events on /trace, GET /state + /state/node with DumpNode round-trip, subquery emitted counters; 65 tests pass, zero new clippy warnings
Unified truthful graph (engine node ids 1:1), SSE-fed state chips via state-store, deep dumps in DetailPanel, deleted build-dbsp/useAggValues; tsc + vite build clean
Verified on private stack: chips update live on insert/delete (agg 29→30→29, multiset 49→48), family/agg dumps render, ≤3 connections

pipeline-viz README rewritten (single view, state model, /state endpoints, removed stale live-toggle), root README + ARCHITECTURE + AGENTS refreshed, in-app explainers rewritten in node-meta.ts/DetailPanel
Rebuild complete: engine state surface + reactive one-view visualizer + docs; verified E2E with Playwright

Circuit view re-added, engine-authoritative: /graph emits operators+opEdges with hop+state bindings; viz renders via build-circuit.ts with engine-declared trace/fresh expansion; op explainers in panel; 10s state safety re-seed added (lossy trace channel); verified live in browser (chips + FlashNode render confirmed); 66 engine tests pass

dbsp/rkyv/feldera-size-of/feldera-macros removed; Tup2/ZWeight defined locally in value.rs; vestigial derives dropped; ordered-float de-pinned; stale circuit comments and docs realigned. cargo build + 124 tests pass; dbsp gone from Cargo.lock.

Added pg::Pool (semaphore-capped per-URL pool, idle reuse, ROLLBACK-on-checkin). Backfills, subquery query-backs, and subset queries now share it; ELECTRIC_DB_POOL_SIZE wired (default 20, was a no-op). Engine tests + full conformance (141) pass.

Standalone shapes now indexed by necessary conjunct (AccessLeaf: Eq hash buckets, range bounds in BTreeMaps, fallback scan for OR/NOT/LIKE/neq). process_envelope visits only candidates on the untraced hot path; full scan kept under trace so visualizer hops are unchanged. Unit tests + full conformance green.

on_table_delta now returns flip work; a single engine flip-propagator task runs query-backs with the registry lock NEVER held across PG round-trips (eval+append stay atomic under it — required for convergence). pending_flips counter exposed via /replication/lsn; conformance drainEngine gained stage 3. Lock sharding deliberately skipped: post-change hold spans are in-memory + appends only, and sharding a cross-shard DAG adds complexity with little gain at this scale. 141/141 conformance green.

replication.rs rewritten: streams a pgoutput slot via pgwire-replication (walsender push, SCRAM, keepalive/feedback) + in-repo pgoutput.rs decoder (proto v1, text-mode tuples deliberately — preserves byte-identity with ::text backfill; binary would force re-stringifying). append-then-acknowledge replaces peek-then-advance; ensure_slot migrates test_decoding slots; publication <slot>_pub created at setup. All decoder+envelope unit tests added; 141/141 conformance green incl. live replication + fuzz. Docs realigned.

Ingestor appends whole commits in order to the single 'changes' stream; ONE LSN-ordered sequencer task replaces per-table tailers (per-table exec state, global (lsn,seq) dedupe, per-transaction atomic flush before the next commit — cross-table). Shape creation is two-phase (pending buffer -> concurrent pooled backfill -> gated activation) so backfills never stall the pipeline. Library-mode ingest + harness barrier moved to the change log. 141/141 conformance + Electric oracle test green. Docs realigned.

Durable shape catalog (meta/catalog stream: created/joined/left/dropped + offset checkpoints via ordered writer task) replayed at boot; plain/routed shapes resume via change-log replay + passthrough gates, aggregates re-seed fresh; subquery shapes dropped loudly (follow-up bead filed for inner-node persistence). Disk-budget undercount fixed earlier (st_blocks du + compose ELECTRIC_STORAGE_DIR wiring). New conformance-restart test proves crash-restore end-to-end; full suite 142/142 green.

All verification done. Electric conformance: oracle 0F, property 0F, subqueries 15/2F (= documented row-tags baseline). Fleet: all 5 benchmarks pass, every metric improved vs 2026-07-02 baseline (creation p99 5022->2806ms scale-1; the report's 10.7s scale-2 p99 now 5.6s); external-electric mode + AGENTS.md instructions added. Browser MCP session: LinearLite live end-to-end (create issue, psql write -> fold 601->602 live), viz logical+circuit views + DumpNode deep dumps work; subquery leave/join verified against PG ground truth (engine exactly right: 204 move-outs, /query + /v1/shape = 400); found+fixed a client-side stale-aggregate-callback race (badge freeze; guarded in packages/client + useShape, repro now converges 603 stable). Final gates: 9 cargo suites ok + 142/142 vitest.

Implemented and verified: dynamic (membership-subquery) shapes + COUNT aggregates served from the circuit; conformance 101/101 in all three modes; live demo verified incl. move-in/out (23-row group) and counts tick 22→23. Static/match-all deliberately stay on the indexed legacy tiers (see commit 5c1189b).

Episode 03-serving-model delivered: three tiers, todo-model walkthrough, static pipeline graph explorer walk with dynamic shape connections; tutorials index links to it. Acceptance criteria met (walk, not embedded screenshot, matching the series' live-canvas style).
